description_long: This kiosk features a cylindrical base with a weathered, rusted metal appearance, supporting a round tabletop that is ringed with rectangular display boxes or compartments. The surface and sides are covered in a mottled pattern of brown, yellow, and reddish hues, giving it a distinctly aged and industrial look. Several of the display boxes are open or ajar, suggesting interactive or storage functionality, and one side has a door-like panel that is partially open, revealing a hollow interior. There are printed signs or posters affixed to the display boxes and the main body, some with faded text and graphics. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the display boxes, with no visible windows but clear signage integrated into the structure. A small, matching side table with similar materials and finish is positioned nearby, reinforcing the utilitarian, urban character of the kiosk.
description: A cylindrical, rusted metal kiosk with a round tabletop, ringed by display boxes and faded signage, featuring a weathered industrial look and a small matching side table.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door panel, several open display boxes, and the small side table in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat tabletop, more open display boxes, and the side table positioned to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with all display boxes closed and no side table visible, emphasizing the cylindrical base and overhanging tabletop.
description_view_3: Back angled view showing faded signage on the main body, closed display boxes, and the side table to the right.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and posters attached to display boxes and main body, with faded text and graphics integrated into the structure.
attribute_door_configuration: One single hinged door on the side panel, partially open.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, round metal roof with slight overhang above display boxes, weathered and rusted.
attribute_architectural_style: Industrial, utilitarian with weathered and rustic influences.
